translations.en: Farmer Nash
translations.zh: 農夫納許

translations.en: a gaunt, tired-looking winged gargoyle.
translations.zh: 面容憔悴、神色疲憊之有翼魔像。

translations.en: The gargoyle screams, "An-bal-sil-fer! Des-lem, klep lem!"
translations.zh: 魔像嘶喊：「An-bal-sil-fer！Des-lem, klep lem！」

translations.en: The gargoyle screams, "The False Prophet! Workers, attack!"
translations.zh: 魔像嘶喊：「偽先知！工人們，攻擊！」

translations.en: "Good $T, noble $P. To be honored by another visit!"
translations.zh: 「$T好，高貴之$P。再度蒞臨，深感榮幸！」

translations.en: "To be amazed!"
translations.zh: 「真令吾大感震驚！」

translations.en: "To greatly admire your nobility, False Prophet."
translations.zh: 「對偽先知之高貴，吾深懷敬佩。」

translations.en: "To honor my people with your sacrifice!"
translations.zh: 「以汝之犧牲榮耀吾族！」

translations.en: "To ask your name, that I may address you as you deserve?"
translations.zh: 「敢問汝之名諱，以便適切地稱呼汝？」

translations.en: "To be honored by your visit, $0."
translations.zh: 「$0蒞臨，深感榮幸。」

translations.en: "To be named Nash Us-arb-vas-lem, Nash the @Leader of Farmers."
translations.zh: 「吾名納許·烏斯-阿爾布-瓦斯-蘭，即農夫@Leader統帥納許。」

translations.en: "To @lead the @wingless ones, the worker gargoyles who tend these fields."
translations.zh: 「@lead領導@wingless無翼者，即看守這些田地的工匠魔像。」

translations.en: "But to have little fortune in my @harvests."
translations.zh: 「然吾之@harvests收成一向不佳。」

translations.en: "To try to give the @wingless ones free reign,
translations.zh: 「試圖給予@wingless無翼者自由，

translations.en: but to be forced to guide them in their work."
translations.zh: 然仍被迫在其工作中加以指引。」

translations.en: "To be far kinder to the wingless ones than most of my kind."
translations.zh: 「吾對無翼者之仁厚，遠超吾族大多數人。」

translations.en: "To feel that the wingless ones should not be enslaved simply because they lack our intelligence."
translations.zh: 「吾認為無翼者不應僅因智力不如吾等便遭奴役。」

translations.en: "To be forced, on occasion, to tend the fields myself because of the harshness of the times."
translations.zh: 「有時因時勢艱難，不得不親自下田耕作。」

translations.en: "To wish my fields were as productive as those of Farmer @Krill, my neighbor to the west."
translations.zh: 「真希望吾的田地能像西邊鄰居@Krill農夫克里爾那樣豐收。」

translations.en: "To be ashamed that Farmer Krill treats his workers so harshly."
translations.zh: 「吾為農夫克里爾對工人如此嚴苛而感到羞恥。」

translations.en: "To be appalled by his lack of concern for their thoughts and feelings."
translations.zh: 「對他漠視工人的想法與感受，吾深感震驚。」

translations.en: "To have been greatly honored by this conversation, noble $P."
translations.zh: 「此番交談令吾深感榮幸，高貴之$P。」

translations.en: "To confess difficulty in understanding your accent. To inquire what $Z means?"
translations.zh: 「坦承難以理解汝之口音。請問$Z是何意？」

translator_notes: 農夫納許為仁厚的魔像農場主，對無翼工匠較為同情，與鄰居克里爾形成對比。魔像 To+動詞 語法一律文言化。
